taxonomy.sub_category: Real Relief Safepad data coming soon Updated on December 19, 2023 · Created on June 20, 2016 Real Relief Safepad Data Coming Soon Safepad is a reusable sanitary pad for women. Developed By RealRelief Tested By Real Relief Safepad Content Partners World Health Organization (WHO) Info Tags Data Coming Soon Product Description Real Relief Safepad™ is a reusable sanitary pad designed to provide a safe and infection free experience while in use. Safepad™ hygienic sanitary pads are designed with a permanently bonded antimicrobial technology that helps reduce vaginal infections caused by Candida albicans along with infections from other pathogens.
